Procs

proc build(lang: string; grammarUrl: Url; scannerUrl: Option[Url] = none(Url);
           scannerFile: RelFile = RelFile(lang & "_scanner.c");
           parserOut: RelFile = RelFile(lang & "_parser.c")) {...}{.raises: [OSError,
    IOError, Exception, LibraryError, SslError, ValueError, HttpRequestError,
    TimeoutError, ProtocolError, KeyError, PathError, ArgumentError, ShellError,
    JsonParsingError], tags: [WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect,
                              ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect,
                              TimeEffect, ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect].}
proc build(lang: string; downUrls: seq[(Url, RelFile)];
           scannerMain: Option[RelFile]; grammarJs: FsFile;
           buildDir: Option[RelDir] = none(RelDir);
           parserOut: RelFile = RelFile(lang & "_parser.c")) {...}{.raises: [OSError,
    IOError, Exception, LibraryError, SslError, ValueError, HttpRequestError,
    TimeoutError, ProtocolError, KeyError, PathError, ArgumentError, ShellError,
    JsonParsingError], tags: [WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect,
                              ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect,
                              TimeEffect, ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect].}
proc tomlCompile() {...}{.raises: [OSError, IOError, Exception, LibraryError,
                              SslError, ValueError, HttpRequestError,
                              TimeoutError, ProtocolError, KeyError, PathError,
                              ArgumentError, ShellError, JsonParsingError], tags: [
    WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, RootEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect,
    WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect, ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect].}
